final_prompt.prompt:
Create an architectural concept illustration of a futuristic sustainable city vision (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "未来主义" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Zaha Hadid parametric architecture (2000s–2010s), 1970s–1980s sci-fi concept art tradition (Syd Mead era), contemporary solarpunk illustration movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a wide, expansive framing that conveys aerial grandeur — exact angle and depth is yours
Subject: must include all of the following:
  - streamlined white building(s) floating / elevated above ground
  - drones surrounding the structure
  - holographic projections integrated into the scene
  - clean energy facilities (solar panels, wind turbines, or equivalent)
Scene/backdrop: needs an open sky environment that reinforces the floating / elevated quality of the architecture — exact time of day and atmosphere is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, visionary, optimistic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction toward crisp whites, luminous blues, and accent energy tones — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-gloss surface treatment on the architecture — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: dystopian or dark tones; cluttered or chaotic compositions; conventional non-futuristic architectural forms
